title: Marketing Manager
description:
• Hybrid working arrangement
  • Exciting marketing campaigns
  • Great working environment, Centrally located


IQPC has an exciting opportunity for an ambitious Marketing Manager to join the team! In this role you'll be responsible for creating and executing innovative marketing plans for events across APAC. This position will provide you with great learning opportunities, a dynamic environment and a high level of responsibility. It will provide you with an in-depth understanding of how to manage large multi-channel marketing campaigns from start to finish.


Here’s a sample of what you’ll get to do every day!


Marketing Campaign Management

  • Strategize and develop marketing plans, budgets, campaign schedules and ensure timely implementation of digital and offline activity
  • Drive targeted delegate and sponsor leads via

a) Social media campaigns that engage the community.

b) Effective E-Mail marketing

c) Compelling web copy and optimized websites


Content Development & Distribution


  • Develop content calendar, create relevant content pieces to support marketing campaign and nurture qualified leads
  • Distribute content through websites, media partners, social media and e-mail marketing to generate leads

Develop/Maintain Relationships with Media Partners

  • Create new and develop existing relationships with leading trade press and industry bodies. Create innovative partnership agreements which will drive interest for the event.
  • Create pre & post-event reports/articles/interviews to be featured in leading industry publications

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree, required, preferably in marketing, public relations or communications
  • At least 1+ years marketing experience preferred
  • Experience creating traditional and digital marketing campaigns
  • Experience creating and managing social media platforms
  • Experience using Google Analytics, CRM systems, Email marketing

postedCompany.description:
IQPC is an international events business that specializes in the production, sales and delivery of B2B C-Level Conferences. Based in Robinson Road, our Singapore office is populated by a cosmopolitan mixture of multilingual and talented professionals. The office is active in most industry sectors, but particularly prominent in Shared Services and Finance, Infrastructure, Oil and Gas and Defence.

Fast paced, young and dynamic we promote a ‘work hard, play hard’ culture where employees are supported, developed and recognised for their contributions both as individuals and teams. 

“Identifying, developing and retaining talented staff is key to our success. The conference business is like no other environment, the pace and intensity is high but so are the rewards. Supporting our staff through training and incentives programs, plus promoting an inclusive and dynamic culture makes this an exciting place to work”. 

Liz Ong, Country Manager Singapore
postedCompany.name: IQPC WORLDWIDE PTE LTD
